steps.title: DashScope API Key
steps.description: Found in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio console → API Key.

fields.label: API Key
fields.hint: Create at Alibaba Cloud Model Studio console → API Key. Starts with sk-.

fields.label: Region
fields.hint: Choose the region closest to you. Singapore is the default international endpoint.

steps.title: Image Defaults
steps.description: Optional. You can override these per request at any time.

fields.label: Default model
fields.hint: wan2.6-t2i is the latest and recommended model.
